top_signals.title: Oil tanker CEO sees Hormuz ship traffic quickly increasing if U.S. and Iran reach a deal
top_signals.summary: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
top_signals.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to rise on Iran peace hopes; UK economy contracted in April
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. We’re expecting fresh data at 7am this morning that will reveal the UK’s headline growth last month. A poll of City economists by Bloomberg suggests the economy will have contracted 0.1 per cent in April, which follows on from a 0.3 per cent expansion in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde, Boris Vujčić: Monetary policy statement (with Q&A)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: LDP pushes tougher land and visa rules while avoiding nationality trap
top_signals.summary: Legal experts have argued that nationality-based restrictions could conflict with domestic law and international agreements.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Larvotto buys Hammer Metals to expand copper holding in Queensland
top_signals.summary: The total equity value of Hammer is estimated at A$54 million ($37.8 million).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ‘Anarchistic neobanks’ are bitcoin’s next frontier, says Blockrise CEO
top_signals.summary: Blockrise CEO Jos Lazet sees bitcoin-native institutions evolving into alternatives to banks, in an interview at BTC Prague.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
